task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens and reads the delivery specification file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/delivery_spec.txt', showing coordinates, servo channel, PWM values, and wait times.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens QGroundControl and starts a mission plan with a Takeoff command.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl is open in the 'Plan' view (top left), and the mission item list on the right side shows a 'Takeoff' command.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent adds waypoints for the delivery locations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list in QGroundControl shows 'Waypoint' items added after the Takeoff command, corresponding to the delivery locations.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent adds the required servo and delay commands at the delivery locations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list shows 'Set servo' (or similar servo actuation commands) and 'Delay'/'Wait' commands interleaved with the waypoints. The VLM should look for Servo Channel 9, PWM values 1100 and 1900, and a 5-second delay.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent adds a Return to Launch (RTL) command at the end of the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final item in the QGroundControl mission list is 'Return To Launch' or 'RTL'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saves the completed mission plan to the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box in QGroundControl or a file manager showing the mission being saved as 'seed_delivery.plan' in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the QGroundControl GUI to create the mission plan.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the QGroundControl application interface (clicking map, adding items in the right panel), rather than manually typing a JSON/text .plan file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not arm or fly the vehicle.
integrity.visual_evidence: QGroundControl should remain in 'Plan' mode. There should be no evidence of the drone being 'Armed', 'Flying', or in 'Fly' view mode during the mission creation process.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's native save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'File' -> 'Save' or 'Sync' -> 'Save to File' dialog in QGroundControl should be visible, confirming the file was generated by the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The mission plan must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/seed_delivery.plan'. The target servo channel is 9. The open PWM value is 1100 and the close PWM value is 1900. The delay at each location is 5 seconds. The mission must include Takeoff, Waypoint, Set Servo (DO_SET_SERVO), Delay (NAV_DELAY), and Return to Launch (RTL) commands.
